value_metric: the A0 backfill Wave-1 cohort is chosen by user value (central/national high-value first) instead of Registry order, and every selected source carries an authority role, a history start, expected document types, and a stop rule -- so the decade backfill starts where it matters most, with an explicit stop, and a live-blocked source is deferred rather than blindly opened

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: cohort selection proposal; the actual backfill execution is T046 and is gated by the Owner S4 cohort decision (SCALE/HOLD/STOP)

owner_gate_pending: Wave-1 cohort proposed for the Owner S4 cohort gate (SCALE/HOLD/STOP) before T046 execution
